title: linaria broussonetii
intro: Linaria broussonetii, also known as the Turkish oropendola, is a flowering plant species in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Linaria broussonetii include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating skin conditions like eczema and wounds. Herbal preparations of Linaria broussonetii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties.
